# Ghatak Sports Academy India (GSAI)

> Government-recognised martial arts and self-defense academy in Lucknow, India — training kids, women and adults in Karate, Taekwondo, MMA, Boxing, Kickboxing, BJJ and Kalaripayattu.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of programs, coaches, and the academy.
- [About](/about): Mission, history, founder and recognitions.
- [Programs](/programs): All martial arts and fitness programs.
- [Enroll](/enroll): Admission form and process.
- [Coaches](/coaches): Certified instructors and their credentials.
- [Facilities](/facilities): Training centres and equipment.
- [Achievements](/achievements): Medals, championships and student wins.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos from training, events and competitions.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming workshops, seminars and exhibitions.
- [Competitions](/competitions): Tournaments and results.
- [Blog](/blogs): Training tips, athlete journeys, academy news.
- [News](/news): Press and academy updates.
- [FAQ](/faq): Programs, admissions, fees and schedules.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email and centre addresses.
- [Lucknow Location](/locations/lucknow): Lucknow centre details.
- [Citations](/citations): Verified business directory listings (NAP).
- [Press](/press): Press kit, logos and media assets.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
